pinatastore.name: Shopping App
pinatastore.description: Complete e-commerce school project inspired by a local business: product catalog, shopping cart and checkout flow, plus an admin panel to run the store. The products for sale are handcrafted piñatas from the business itself.
pinatastore.objective: Digitize the full operation of a real store: sales, inventory and administration in a single platform.
pinatastore.challenge: Model a real purchase flow — inventory, promotions, orders, employees and customers — on a relational database, and process online payments securely.
pinatastore.solution: Normalized MySQL database for inventory, payments, users and orders; an admin panel to manage products, promotions, employees, customers and orders; and online payment integration.
results: Application deployed to a public environment
Full store administration from the panel

modular.name: Student Marketplace
modular.description: Web platform that will centralize buying and selling between CUCEI students: listings with price, location and selling hours, category-based search, and buyer/seller roles. It's my degree's capstone (modular) project, built as a team.
modular.objective: Replace informal WhatsApp and Facebook groups with a single platform connecting supply and demand inside the university campus.
modular.challenge: Listings scattered across social networks are linear and volatile: no persistence or categorization, and no clear information about prices, seller location and availability.
modular.solution: Web application with registration and buyer/seller roles, categorized product listings and filtered search, built in phases — UI/UX design, backend with APIs and database, responsive frontend and testing with real users — under a Scrum-based agile methodology.
results: Goal: registration module with buyer and seller roles
Goal: functional search by categories and filters
Goal: over 60% user acceptance in pilot tests

manuelmisael.name: Manuel Misael Photography
manuelmisael.description: Professional website for a photographer: services, photo portfolio and booking information, with a bilingual experience and interactive galleries.
manuelmisael.objective: Give the photographer a digital presence and turn visits into booking requests.
manuelmisael.challenge: Display image-heavy galleries without sacrificing performance, serve a bilingual audience and make the booking flow clear.
manuelmisael.solution: Responsive React application with dynamic language switching, interactive animated galleries and a booking section (KINNETA) with API-connected forms.
results: Clients browse packages and book from the site

about.label: ... /about-me ...
paragraphs: I study Computer Engineering at the University of Guadalajara (CUCEI), with an estimated graduation in 2027. To complement what I learn in class, I build real projects: I have designed and developed web applications from scratch for local businesses.

I'm interested in every area of development, so I'm always looking to learn both backend and frontend. I really enjoy the process of solving a problem from scratch: thinking about how to organize the data and making sure the end user has a great experience using the app.
